docs.text: Courses & Certificates DeepLearning.AI TensorFlow Developer : (DeepLearning.AI on Coursera) From this Specialization, I have learned how to build and train neural networks using TensorFlow, how to improve network performance using convolutions as we train it to identify real-world images, how to teach machines to understand, analyze, and respond to human speech with natural language processing systems, and more, as these and other TensorFlow concepts are going to be at the forefront of the coming transformation to an AI-powered future. Machine Learning : (Stanford University on coursera) This course builds the basics of the machine learning. Python for Everybody Specialization : (University of Michigan on coursera) This Specialization builds on the success of the Python for Everybody course and will introduce fundamental programming concepts including data structures, networked application program interfaces, and databases, using the Python programming language. Skills Programming Languages: C, Python Librares : Pandas, Numpy, Scikit-learn, Matplotlib, Seaborn, Tensorflow, Keras Communication: English, Urdu, Kashmiri Others: DataScience, Arduino, LaTex , Markdown
